dashboard.label: TRIDENT-AI Command Centre
dashboard.description: Autonomous Incident Intelligence — Zero-Touch Detection & Response

search.query: index=trident_incidents sourcetype=trident:incident status="OPEN" | dedup incident_id | sort -severity_score | head 20 | table incident_id, timestamp, severity, severity_score, title, confidence, status

index=trident_incidents sourcetype=trident:incident | head 1 | spath output=actual path=agent_trace.telemetry_sentinel.actual_vs_forecast.actual | spath output=forecast path=agent_trace.telemetry_sentinel.actual_vs_forecast.forecast | eval metric_type="Payments Latency (ms)" | table metric_type, actual, forecast

index=trident_audit sourcetype=trident:audit | stats latest(status) as status by agent_name | eval icon=case(status="COMPLETE", "✅", status="INVESTIGATING", "🔄", status="ERROR", "❌", 1=1, "⏸️") | eval display=icon." ".agent_name." — ".status | table display

index=trident_audit sourcetype=trident:audit | sort -_time | head 50 | table _time, rpc_id, method, status_code, security_violation | eval security_violation=if(security_violation="true", "⚠️ VIOLATION", "✅ CLEAN")
